---
title: "test_bootstrap_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_bootstrap_empire.py"
loc: 27
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.92
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.84
---

## Intent
The `test_bootstrap_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestBootstrapEmpire, setup_method, test_bootstrap_flow, test_bootstrap_no_env_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestBootstrapEmpire, setup_method, test_bootstrap_flow, test_bootstrap_no_env_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel](file://src.sentinel)

### Exports
- `TestBootstrapEmpire`
- `setup_method`
- `test_bootstrap_flow`
- `test_bootstrap_no_env_file`
